Robust fixes for the accent selection and the waveform.

### Fixed
- **Waveform:** the played portion was drawn at 50% opacity by the base skin — it now shows at full strength so it matches the accent you picked.
- **Selection text:** every element in a selected row (rating stars, now-playing list text, labels) now flips to readable auto-contrast text on the accent, in both focus states.

### Important — force a recompile
MediaMonkey caches the compiled skin, so an update can look unchanged. After installing, **switch to another skin and back** to Flat Monkey Dark (or restart MediaMonkey) to force the new LESS to recompile.
